Ampelopsis biloba, also known as Ampelopsis biligulata, is a type of flowering plant in the grape family (Vitaceae). The health benefits of Ampelopsis biloba include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and prevent infections. The bioactive constituents of Ampelopsis biloba include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ampelopsis biloba include teas, extracts, and capsules, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and reduce stress.
